John Darcy, 1st Baron Darcy de Knayth
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
John Darcy, 1st Baron Darcy de Knayth (c. 1290 – 30 May 1347), was an English peer.
He was born circa 1280, probably at K …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Darcy於1322年出生在英國林可爾史爾可乃斯時，他的父親Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I39歲，母親Emmeline Heron33歲。他於大約1338年與Baroness Alianore de Holand在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1356年3月5日在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓享年34歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾諾可頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Darcy于1322年出生在英国林可爾史爾可乃斯时，他的父亲Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I39岁，母亲Emmeline Heron33岁。他于大约1338年与Baroness Alianore de Holand在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1356年3月5日在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓享年34岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Darcy was born in 1322, in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I, was 39 and his mother, Emmeline Heron, was 33. He married Baroness Alianore de Holand about 1338, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1346. He died on 5 March 1356, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Darcy est né en 1322, à Knaith, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Emmeline Heron, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Alianore de Holand environ 1338, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1356, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Darcy 1322 in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I 39 und seine Mutter Emmeline Heron 33. Er hat um 1338 in Yorkshire, England Baroness Alianore de Holand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 5. März 1356 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Darcy è nato il nel 1322 nel Knaith, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Emmeline Heron, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Alianore de Holand circa 1338, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì il 5 marzo 1356, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Darcyが1322年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアナイスで生まれた時，父Lord John Le Neveu Darcy Iは39歳，母Emmeline Heronは33歳であった。約1338年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでBaroness Alianore de Holandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1356年3月5日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで34歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Darcy(이)가 1322년 영국 링코실르 나이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmeline Heron(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1338년 영국 요르크실르에서 Baroness Alianore de Holand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1356년 3월 5일 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Darcy nasceu em 1322, em Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline Heron, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Alianore de Holand aproximadamente 1338, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1356, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Darcy родился в 1322 г. в местности неит, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline Heron, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Alianore de Holand около 1338 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 5 марта 1356 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Darcy nació en 1322, en Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Emmeline Heron, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Baroness Alianore de Holand aproximadamente 1338, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1356, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
